changes.rationale: Keep architecture review concise and expose only the bounded quality evidence tools required by the normal-session bridge.
Preserve the established diagnosis prompt while provider options remain informational model configuration.
Preserve bounded exploration guidance while provider options remain informational model configuration.
Require native edit permission mediation so writable implementation cannot bypass the runner-owned quality gate.
Preserve the gated learning workflow while provider options remain informational model configuration.
Align high-assurance orchestration with the bounded dossier tools and runner-owned edit and delegation authorization.
Align ordinary orchestration with standard-lite versus high or critical dossier handling and runner-owned authorization.
Preserve read-only research guidance while provider options remain informational model configuration.
Preserve the read-only review workflow while provider options remain informational model configuration.
Allow bounded read-only dossier challenge evidence without granting mutation capabilities.
Allow trusted verification recording while preserving the verifier read-only boundary.
Require exact debugging evidence while preventing credentials, private paths, PII, and raw production payloads from being shared or persisted.
Extend semantic release review to the complete Milestone 2 workflow, producer, receipt, and same-run provenance contract.
Align computational Engineering Dossier risk classes with schema and constants while preserving the legacy operational trace label.
